stories.headline: Ukraine, Russia kill several civilians in tit-for-tat attacks

stories.headline: Don't commit war crimes in Iran, EU urges Trump as deadline looms

stories.headline: Treasuries Fall Ahead of Auction as Iran War Stokes Oil Gains

stories.headline: US Stocks Extend Declines as Trump’s Iran Deadline Looms
stories.summary: US stocks dropped as intensifying geopolitical tensions and mixed economic data weigh on investors ahead of a key US deadline on Iran.

stories.headline: Bitcoin Slides With Risk Assets as Trump’s Iran Ultimatum Looms
stories.summary: Bitcoin slipped as cryptocurrencies were swept up in broader market volatility after a series of attacks on Iran’s infrastructure as President Donald Trump’s key ceasefire deadline approaches.

stories.headline: Russia provided Iran with intelligence on Israeli energy sites, Ukraine says

stories.summary: Iranian officials have told Al Jazeera the US and Israel's attacks seek to wipe out Iranian identity.

stories.headline: Why Matt Maley is Nervous about Private Credit
stories.summary: Miller Tabak Chief Market Strategist Matt Maley is warning that private credit risks are being underestimated. It’s not about size—it’s about what happens when liquidity dries up in an already expensive market. He says even a modest credit event could shake confidence fast, and concerns are growing that bad underwriting may be underneath it all. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: IMF Points to Risks in Shadow Banking Growth in Emerging Markets
stories.summary: Emerging market policymakers should closely monitor how the growth of non-bank lending is exposing their countries to new risks, according to the International Monetary Fund.

stories.headline: Australian and IPL cricket great David Warner charged with drink-driving
stories.summary: The 39-year-old, who retired from international cricket in 2024, still features in T20 franchise cricket.

stories.headline: Bill Ackman proposes €56 billion acquisition of Universal Music Group
stories.summary: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman has proposed a €56 billion deal to merge Universal Music Group with a US acquisition vehicle, delivering shareholders a 78% premium and a potential New York Stock Exchange listing.

stories.headline: Greek parliament recommends lifting MP immunity in EU farm subsidy fraud scandal

stories.headline: Vietnam's leader To Lam strengthens power in unanimous assembly vote

stories.headline: Private Credit Exodus Turns Moody’s Outlook on BDCs to Negative
stories.summary: A swelling wave of redemptions has driven Moody’s Ratings to revise its outlook for private credit investment vehicles to negative, after holding the line at stable for over two years.

stories.headline: Zambia-Lobito Copper Rail Link to Cost as Much as $5 Billion
stories.summary: A railway planned to connect Zambia’s copper mines to global markets via the Lobito port in neighboring Angola will cost as much as $5 billion, with construction set to start his year, according to an environmental study for the project.

stories.headline: UBS Taps Bond Insurer for Debt Backed by Private Credit Stakes
stories.summary: UBS Group AG is packaging its stakes in eight private credit funds into debt that’s backed by an insurance company, a financial maneuver that would allow the bank to cash out of the positions without having to unload them directly.

stories.headline: Brazil Courts Investors Ahead of Potential Euro Bond Return
stories.summary: Brazil is sounding out investors as it weighs a return to global debt markets, potentially paving the way for its first euro-denominated issuance in more than a decade.

stories.headline: India Extends IPO Approvals as Market Volatility Delay Listings

stories.headline: Fact-Checking Republicans’ Misleading Claims About Mail-In Ballots and Fraudulent Voting
stories.summary: President Trump, his administration and G.O.P. lawmakers have claimed widespread issues with mailed ballots and fraudulent voting, but the evidence doesn’t support them.

stories.headline: Without Elon Musk, Wisconsin’s Supreme Court Justice Election Goes Quiet
stories.summary: Elections for the Wisconsin Supreme Court have previously brought record-breaking spending and national attention. Tuesday’s race has been a more muted affair.

stories.headline: Trump Calls Artemis II Astronauts After Their Historic Journey Around the Moon
stories.summary: The conversation celebrated a small, but significant, step in an ambitious plan for missions to the moon and Mars that Mr. Trump had set early in his first term.

stories.headline: How Trump’s Endorsement in California Could Backfire Against Republicans

stories.headline: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits off Indonesia, killing one
